title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
summary_full: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.
summary_public: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump has called for an Iran uprising
